description.zh-Hans: 生成适用于32/64像素RPG特效的分层烟团，支持浓烟、薄雾、蒸汽和灰尘；烟团会上升、扩散、受风偏移并以离散透明度消散。
description.en: Generates layered 32/64px RPG smoke puffs in thick, mist, steam, and dust modes with rise, expansion, wind drift, and quantized fading.

triggers.zh-Hans: 烟雾, 烟, 蒸汽, 灰尘, 粒子效果, 爆炸
triggers.en: smoke, steam, mist, dust, particle, explosion

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成烟雾或蒸汽的粒子动画效果，随时间参数消散上升，可做爆炸或环境烟雾。
exampleUsage.en: Generates particle-based smoke or steam animation driven by a time parameter for explosions or environmental haze.
